result.stdout:
USAGE:
    xenial [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information
    -w, --working-directory    The working directory  
    -v, --verbosity                                   

COMMANDS:
    build     
    model

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    xenial [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information
    -w, --working-directory    The working directory  
    -v, --verbosity                                   

COMMANDS:
    build     
    model

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    xenial build [project] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Project (csproj) or Solution (sln) file

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                          
    -w, --working-directory    The working directory                            
    -v, --verbosity                                                             
        --no-restore           Doesn't execute an implicit restore during build 
        --no-build             Doesn't execute an implicit build                
        --build-verbosity      Specifies the msbuild log verbosity during build 
        --log-build            Specifies if msbuild should log to command line  
        --tfms                 Specifies the target framework monikers. Use *   
                               for all, separate by semicolon for multiple      
                               values                                           
    -s, --strict               Specifies if error behavior should be strict.    
                               When set to false, it continues even if build    
                               errors are present

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    xenial build [project] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Project (csproj) or Solution (sln) file

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                          
    -w, --working-directory    The working directory                            
    -v, --verbosity                                                             
        --no-restore           Doesn't execute an implicit restore during build 
        --no-build             Doesn't execute an implicit build                
        --build-verbosity      Specifies the msbuild log verbosity during build 
        --log-build            Specifies if msbuild should log to command line  
        --tfms                 Specifies the target framework monikers. Use *   
                               for all, separate by semicolon for multiple      
                               values                                           
    -s, --strict               Specifies if error behavior should be strict.    
                               When set to false, it continues even if build    
                               errors are present

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    xenial model [project] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Project (csproj) or Solution (sln) file

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                          
    -w, --working-directory    The working directory                            
    -v, --verbosity                                                             
        --no-restore           Doesn't execute an implicit restore during build 
        --no-build             Doesn't execute an implicit build                
        --build-verbosity      Specifies the msbuild log verbosity during build 
        --log-build            Specifies if msbuild should log to command line  
        --tfms                 Specifies the target framework monikers. Use *   
                               for all, separate by semicolon for multiple      
                               values                                           
    -s, --strict               Specifies if error behavior should be strict.    
                               When set to false, it continues even if build    
                               errors are present                               
    -f, --tfm                  Specifies the target framework to load the model 
                               from. Is required when the project is            
                               multi-targeted                                   
    -n, --namespaces           Specifies which namespaces to inspect. You can   
                               specify multiple by separation by semicolon      
        --views                Specifies which views to inspect. You can specify
                               multiple by separation by semicolon              
    -p, --package-version      Specifies which nuget package version to install.
                               By default it matches the cli tool version       
    -r, --references           Specifies if the project references should be    
                               built

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    xenial model [project] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [project]    Project (csproj) or Solution (sln) file

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                          
    -w, --working-directory    The working directory                            
    -v, --verbosity                                                             
        --no-restore           Doesn't execute an implicit restore during build 
        --no-build             Doesn't execute an implicit build                
        --build-verbosity      Specifies the msbuild log verbosity during build 
        --log-build            Specifies if msbuild should log to command line  
        --tfms                 Specifies the target framework monikers. Use *   
                               for all, separate by semicolon for multiple      
                               values                                           
    -s, --strict               Specifies if error behavior should be strict.    
                               When set to false, it continues even if build    
                               errors are present                               
    -f, --tfm                  Specifies the target framework to load the model 
                               from. Is required when the project is            
                               multi-targeted                                   
    -n, --namespaces           Specifies which namespaces to inspect. You can   
                               specify multiple by separation by semicolon      
        --views                Specifies which views to inspect. You can specify
                               multiple by separation by semicolon              
    -p, --package-version      Specifies which nuget package version to install.
                               By default it matches the cli tool version       
    -r, --references           Specifies if the project references should be    
                               built
